issues.title: 22 mocked critical-flows tests fail strict-mode on getByText('긴급 알림')
issues.description:
Commit d5d183f promoted the parent emergency-alert popup to a full alertdialog with its own

긴급 알림

heading. The original tile
긴급 알림
was kept. Existing test assertions assumed a single match, so Playwright strict mode throws on every parent-flow test that runs the emergency-alert handshake. UI is correct; tests are stale selectors.
issues.fix_hint: Update tests to use page.getByRole('heading', { name: '긴급 알림' }) or page.getByText('긴급 알림').first().

issues.title: Mocked critical-flow line 722 fails on getByText('학부모 모드') hidden by compact-header CSS
issues.description: Commit a4b5795 added .hyeni-top-header--parent-compact .hyeni-top-header-mode-rail { display:none } in src/App.css line 712-714. The 학부모 모드 chip is inside that rail. Parent top-header now defaults to compact, so the chip exists in DOM (matched 13x) but is display:none. Test #14 (the long parent-mode e2e) blocks on this one line after passing the 혜니 오늘 요약 region check.
issues.fix_hint: Drop the 학부모 모드 assertion (parent role is already implicit) or assert getByRole('region', { name: '부모 메인' }) instead. Agent 01 mis-described this as img[name=혜니] - actual selector is getByText('학부모 모드').

issues.title: 2 child-mode critical-flow tests also fail (child memo horizontal, child pairing pre-flight)
issues.description: Same root-cause family as AG08-01 - these tests share the emergency-alert handshake pattern at the top of their flows.

issues.title: 11 mocked tests are quarantined via test.fixme - tech debt, not env-blocked
issues.description: tests/e2e/subscription-flow.spec.js wraps 10 tests in test.describe.fixme with a code comment (lines 502-509) explaining the legacy hyeni-mock-db-v1 backend was removed and these need migrating to page.route interceptors. tests/e2e/force-ring-realtime.spec.js:3 has its own test.fixme TODO for a Realtime mock fixture.
issues.fix_hint: Track as backlog. Not blocking ship.

issues.title: Vite warns on dynamic-vs-static import duplication for src/lib/auth.js and @capacitor/core
issues.description: Visible during real-services preview build. Means those modules will not be code-split. Cosmetic chunk-size hint, no behavior impact. Pairs with the chunk-size>500kB warning Agent 01 already filed as P2-01.
issues.fix_hint: Resolve auth.js imports to one mode (static everywhere). Same for @capacitor/core via nativePlugins.js.

non_blocking_concerns: Mocked-suite CI gate will stay red until critical-flows.spec.js selectors are updated for commits d5d183f and a4b5795. Tests-vs-UI drift only - no product defect.
Real-services suite (43/43) confirms runtime, Supabase, Realtime, RLS, Kakao Maps, multichild subscription, and SOS paths are all healthy.
